lessons.description: Kai completes five onboarding levels before the Filipino myth horror journey begins.

levels.title: The Awakening
levels.objective: Follow the first movement and code-input prompt.
levels.expectedOutput: Kai reaches the first checkpoint and the next tutorial node unlocks.

levels.title: What Is Your Name?
levels.objective: Complete the name/input prompt correctly.
levels.expectedOutput: The dialogue accepts Kai's identity and opens the next route.

levels.title: Voices of the Village
levels.objective: Use the required text values for the dialogue trial.
levels.expectedOutput: The conversation completes and Kai can continue.

levels.title: The Coin Keeper
levels.objective: Provide the correct whole-number value for the toll event.
levels.expectedOutput: The toll is accepted and the obstacle clears.

levels.title: Potion Measure
levels.objective: Provide the correct decimal value for the potion event.
levels.expectedOutput: The potion activates and the main curriculum unlocks.

lessons.description: Kai searches a haunted barangay for coded clues while learning arrays.

levels.title: Lantern Row
levels.objective: Declare an array that stores a fixed set of lantern brightness values.
levels.expectedOutput: The correct lanterns light up and the street checkpoint opens.

levels.title: Sari-Sari Shelf
levels.objective: Read values from an array by index to choose the requested item.
levels.expectedOutput: Kai collects the correct item and avoids the wrong shelf trigger.

levels.title: Bamboo Markers
levels.objective: Create and update a one-dimensional array of path markers.
levels.expectedOutput: The marked platforms appear in the correct order.

levels.title: River Stones
levels.objective: Use a one-dimensional array to select safe stepping stones.
levels.expectedOutput: Safe stones stay solid and Kai crosses the river.

levels.title: Window Grid
levels.objective: Declare a two-dimensional array representing lit and unlit windows.
levels.expectedOutput: The correct window pattern reveals the hidden route.

levels.title: Cave Tiles
levels.objective: Read a two-dimensional array by row and column.
levels.expectedOutput: Kai lands on the safe tile and the cave path extends.

levels.title: Firefly Trail
levels.objective: Traverse a one-dimensional array to collect every required firefly.
levels.expectedOutput: All fireflies gather into a guide light.

levels.title: Aswang Patrol
levels.objective: Traverse an array and count matching danger markers.
levels.expectedOutput: The patrol route is predicted and Kai slips past safely.

lessons.description: Kai learns reusable methods while escaping deeper into a haunted forest.

levels.title: Call the Guide
levels.objective: Define and call a simple method.
levels.expectedOutput: The guide signal appears and the first forest gate opens.

levels.title: Repeat the Chant
levels.objective: Call a method multiple times in the required order.
levels.expectedOutput: The chant stabilizes the platforms.

levels.title: Light Without Return
levels.objective: Write a method with no parameters and no return value.
levels.expectedOutput: A lamp turns on and clears a dark section.

levels.title: Bell Without Return
levels.objective: Use a no-parameter void method to trigger an action.
levels.expectedOutput: The bell distracts the creature patrol.

levels.title: Find the Charm
levels.objective: Write a no-parameter method that returns a value.
levels.expectedOutput: The returned charm code unlocks a sealed gate.

levels.title: Measure the Shadow
levels.objective: Return a calculated value from a no-parameter method.
levels.expectedOutput: The shadow length is accepted and the bridge appears.

levels.title: Pass the Offering
levels.objective: Write a method with parameters and no return value.
levels.expectedOutput: The offering is placed correctly and the path calms.

levels.title: Tune the Gongs
levels.objective: Use parameters to trigger different actions without returning data.
levels.expectedOutput: The correct gong sequence disables the hazard.

levels.title: Compute the Ward
levels.objective: Write a method with parameters and a return value.
levels.expectedOutput: The returned ward strength blocks the next attack.

levels.title: Trade for Passage
levels.objective: Return a result based on multiple parameter values.
levels.expectedOutput: The trade total is correct and Kai receives the pass.

levels.title: Echo Steps
levels.objective: Write a recursive method with a valid base case.
levels.expectedOutput: The echo platforms count down and stop safely.

levels.title: Kapre's Last Smoke
levels.objective: Use recursion to solve the final forest sequence.
levels.expectedOutput: The smoke clears and Kai reaches the final array-method area.

lessons.description: Kai passes arrays into methods to solve the last route before the eclipse.

levels.title: Bundle the Clues
levels.objective: Pass a one-dimensional array into a method.
levels.expectedOutput: The method reads the clue bundle and marks the safe route.

levels.title: Count the Charms
levels.objective: Return a result from a method that processes a one-dimensional array.
levels.expectedOutput: The correct charm count unlocks the crossing.

levels.title: Map the Crossing
levels.objective: Pass a two-dimensional array into a method.
levels.expectedOutput: The method identifies the safe row and column path.

levels.title: Seal the Grid
levels.objective: Return a result from a method that processes a two-dimensional array.
levels.expectedOutput: The grid seal activates and the final level unlocks.

lessons.description: Kai combines all lessons to stop the eclipse.

levels.title: Bakunawa Eclipse
levels.objective: Combine arrays, traversal, methods, parameters, return values, and recursion.
levels.expectedOutput: The final seal is restored and the ending sequence unlocks.
